headline: Jim Cramer Says “Qnity Has Become One of My Favorite New Stocks”
summary: Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE:Q) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer believes that being spun off was good for the company, as he said: In seventh and eighth places, we’ve got two semiconductor-related names, Teradyne, up 32.8%, and Qnity Electronics, up 31.8%. Teradyne is a semiconductor test […]

headline: BASFY Wraps Up OBA Transfer to Catexel, Advances Portfolio Shift
summary: BASF completes sale of its Optical Brightening Agent business to Catexel, advancing its Winning Ways portfolio shift toward higher-growth core segments.
